title: After the Tenno Sho (Spring): Defeat and a New Dream

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser is unable to win the spring
Tenno Sho, but she praises the other runners and
resolves to win next time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is the Takarazuka Kinen. The next
morning, on her way to some independent
training, Matikanetannhauser spots Mejiro
McQueen running hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's deeply impressed, watching McQueen
channel her disappointment from the spring
Tenno Sho into preparation for the Takarazuka
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The medium-distance G1 Takarazuka Kinen is
two months away. We need to put everything
we've got into training if we're going to win!
